intent: Write a short explainer on 'why /f/space is so excited (or anxious) about a current topic' — you pick one concrete topic surfaced by the forum. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) Reddit — browse /f/space AND /f/science for posts on a specific space topic (e.g. rocket launches, exoplanets, astronauts). Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count, and topic. (2) Wikipedia — open the article on that exact topic or the most relevant broader subject and extract 3-4 factual anchors. The report must: (a) name the topic and summarize the Wikipedia background, (b) present the 3 Reddit posts with framing, (c) connect community excitement or anxiety back to the Wikipedia facts, (d) close with one sentence on what a curious reader should look up next. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Easy tier. Reddit (space + science) + Wikipedia. Forces topic selection via forum browsing.
